prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-FIRSTAIDKIT-55PC Product Type: FIRST_AID_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 55pc Compact Travel First Aid Kit in Resealable Bag Hiking Camping Gear Emergency Preparedness Items Description: The importance of emergency preparedness cannot be stressed enough, especially when you find yourself out in the elements, in remote locations or away from readily available medical help or first responders. While this kit might be small, it could save a life in the event of an emergency, or stop a minor injury from becoming a bigger, unmanageable one.

The first aid kit comes with the following components:

x8 pads; x4 sting relief wipes; x1 soap wipe; x12 small adhesive bandages (1-1/2 x 3/8 inches); x12 medium adhesive bandages (2-7/8 x ¾ inches); x12 large adhesive bandages (3 x 1 inch); x4 gauze pads (2pc per pack); x1 PBT Bandage (2 x 1-3/4 inches)

Packed in a resealable bag, the first aid kit is portable and able to be refilled as needed. Compact and very lightweight, the first aid kit is easy to pack with your gear without any extra added weight or bulk for on the go readiness; ideal to keep with your personal belongings, especially when traveling, to keep in your car, or to pack for shorter outdoor excursions when you want to carry minimal amounts of gear.

Be ready and prepared to handle minor burns, scratches, scrapes or stings with this handy and easy to tote 55pc first aid kit from ASR Outdoor. Perfect to keep with your camping, backpacking, biking, skiing and hiking gear, or when traveling or road tripping. Search Terms: Prepper supplies first aid kit survival gear and supplies bug out bag travel accessories emergency preparedness items roadside emergency car kit bandages bandaid injury wrap prepper gear hiking backpacking camping gear medical tape car accessories Features: - 55PC FIRST AID KIT: First aid kit includes x8 pads; x4 sting relief wipes; x1 soap wipe; x12 small adhesive bandages; x12 medium adhesive bandages; x12 large adhesive bandages; x4 gauze pads; x1 PBT Bandage - POCKET SIZED AND PORTABLE: Compact, portable and lightweight, this first aid kit from ASR Outdoor is the perfect size to pack with your personal belongings when traveling, camping, hiking, backpacking, biking, skiing and more - CAR ACCESSORIES: The 55pc first aid kit is a great addition to any roadside emergency car kit or vehicle survival kit so you can handle minor stings, burns, scrapes and scratches when you’re on the go - REUSABLE BAG: Resealable bag means you can continue adding medical supplies and emergency preparedness items to this handy reuseable bag when existing supplies start to run low - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.5 x 4.75 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.10lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 55pc Compact Travel First Aid Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 55pc Compact Travel First Aid Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Resealable Bag, Portable Emergency Preparedness, Hiking Camping Gear, Car Kit, Bandages And Gauze

openai.title_differentiation: 55 Pieces, Resealable Bag, Compact And Lightweight, Hiking Camping Travel, Car Emergency Preparedness
